Metadata.title: Lumida
Metadata.description: Connected health, made clear. Access and understand your health data from any browser.
Metadata.homeTitle: Lumida · Web dashboard for Google Health & Fitbit data
Metadata.homeDescription: The Fitbit web dashboard is gone. Lumida replaces it: see your Google Health steps, sleep, heart rate, weight and workouts from any browser. Free early access.
Metadata.ogTagline: The web dashboard for your Google Health data.

TemperatureUnitSelector.label: Temperature unit
TemperatureUnitSelector.saveError: The temperature unit could not be updated.

DemoData.bannerDescription: You are currently using demonstration data. <settings>Change this in Settings.</settings>
DemoData.settingDescription: Use a local fictional dataset to explore every health screen.
DemoData.saveError: The health data source could not be updated.

DeveloperMode.settingDescription: Show a download control on health pages for the raw Lumida data loaded for the selected period. These files contain sensitive health data; share them only with someone you trust.
DeveloperMode.saveError: Developer mode could not be updated.
DeveloperMode.downloadError: The raw data file could not be created.

Home.heroDescription: Review your activity, sleep, and health metrics directly from your browser.
Home.designDescription: Lumida is built with your feedback and expectations to create a health dashboard that truly meets your needs.
Home.privacyDescription: Your health data is yours. Lumida is designed around that principle: we don’t store it.
Home.footerTagline: View health data from Google Health, Fitbit, or other compatible devices directly in your browser.
Home.disclaimer: Lumida is not affiliated with Google, Google Health, or Fitbit.

preview.weightChartLabel: Daily weight trend over one month
preview.macroChartLabel: Protein, carbohydrate, and fat energy distribution this week

contact.hint: Hidden until requested to limit automated collection.
contact.error: This contact detail could not be displayed. Please try again.

metadata.title: Legal notice
metadata.description: Publisher, hosting, contact and legal information for Lumida.

LegalNoticePage.title: Legal notice
LegalNoticePage.description: Information identifying the publisher of Lumida and the main technical providers used to operate the service.

publisher.title: Website publisher
publisher.intro: The Lumida website and application are published by:
publisher.vatValue: VAT not applicable under Article 293 B of the French General Tax Code.

publication.title: Publication and development
publication.description: The publication director and developer of Lumida is {name}.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.intro: Lumida relies on the following infrastructure providers:

service.title: Nature of the service
service.description: Lumida is a free beta service reserved for adults. It provides a browser interface for reviewing health and fitness information authorized by the user through Google Health.

property.title: Intellectual property
property.description: Unless otherwise stated, the name Lumida, the interface, texts, graphics, visual elements and software components of the service are protected by applicable intellectual-property laws. Reproduction, adaptation or distribution without prior authorization is prohibited, subject to statutory exceptions.

liability.title: Health information and liability
liability.description: Lumida is a wellbeing information tool, not a medical device. It does not provide a diagnosis, treatment or medical advice and must not be used for emergencies. Users remain responsible for consulting a qualified healthcare professional when appropriate.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: The publisher can be contacted using the details below. They are revealed only on request to reduce automated collection.

metadata.title: Terms of use
metadata.description: Terms governing access to and use of the Lumida beta service.

TermsPage.title: Terms of use
TermsPage.description: These terms govern access to and use of Lumida. Please read them before creating an account or connecting Google Health.

scope.title: Purpose and acceptance
scope.description: By creating an account or using Lumida, you agree to these terms and acknowledge the privacy policy. If you do not agree, you must not use the service. Acceptance of these terms does not replace the separate consent requested for access to health data.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.description: Lumida is reserved for individuals aged 18 or over who have the legal capacity to enter into these terms. The service is currently offered as a free beta.

account.title: Account responsibilities
account.intro: You are responsible for your account and agree to:
account.itemAccurate: provide accurate and current registration information;
account.itemSecurity: keep your login credentials confidential and use a secure password;
account.itemPersonal: use the account for yourself and not impersonate another person;
account.itemNotice: notify Lumida promptly if you suspect unauthorized access.

health.title: Connecting Google Health
health.description: Connecting Google Health is optional. You choose the Google account to connect and authorize the requested read-only permissions through Google OAuth. Lumida accesses only the categories needed for the features presented and you can disconnect the integration at any time. During the Google test phase, access remains subject to available capacity and prior approval.

beta.title: Free beta and availability
beta.description: Lumida is provided free of charge during its beta phase. Features, compatibility and access conditions may change as the product develops. The service may be interrupted for maintenance, security, provider limitations or technical incidents, and no uninterrupted availability commitment is made.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemIllegal: use Lumida for an unlawful, fraudulent or harmful purpose;
acceptableUse.itemSecurity: attempt to bypass security, access another account or disrupt the service;
acceptableUse.itemAutomated: perform excessive automated requests, scraping or extraction that harms the service;
acceptableUse.itemThirdParty: upload, connect or use data that you are not authorized to access.

disclaimer.title: No medical advice
disclaimer.description: Lumida presents data for personal information and wellbeing purposes. It does not verify the medical accuracy of source-device data, diagnose conditions or replace a doctor, emergency service or qualified healthcare professional. Never delay seeking medical advice because of information displayed by Lumida.

thirdParties.title: Third-party services
thirdParties.description: Lumida depends on services operated by Google, Fitbit and technical providers. Their own terms and privacy policies apply to their services. Lumida is not affiliated with or endorsed by Google, Google Health or Fitbit and cannot guarantee the availability or accuracy of third-party services.

property.title: Intellectual property
property.description: Lumida and its original content, interface and software remain the property of their respective rights holders. These terms grant only a personal, limited, non-exclusive and revocable right to use the service.

suspension.title: Suspension and account closure
suspension.description: Access may be restricted or suspended to protect the service, comply with the law, address a breach of these terms or manage beta capacity. You may stop using Lumida, disconnect Google Health and request account deletion at any time.

liability.title: Liability
liability.description: Lumida is provided with reasonable care in view of its free beta status. To the extent permitted by law, the publisher is not liable for indirect loss, loss caused by a third-party service, inaccurate source data or an interruption beyond its reasonable control. Nothing in these terms limits rights or liabilities that cannot legally be excluded.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.description: These terms may be updated to reflect changes to Lumida, its providers or applicable law. The effective date is shown at the top of this page. Material changes will be brought to users’ attention by an appropriate means.

law.title: Applicable law
law.description: These terms are governed by French law, without depriving consumers of mandatory protections available in their country of residence. The parties will first seek an amicable solution; otherwise, the competent courts are determined by applicable procedural law.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Questions about these terms can be sent to the general Lumida contact address.

metadata.title: Privacy policy
metadata.description: How Lumida accesses, uses, protects and retains account and Google Health data.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy policy
PrivacyPage.description: This policy explains how Lumida handles personal data when you create an account, connect Google Health or use the service.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.description: The controller for personal data processed by Lumida is {name}, sole trader.

principle.title: Our core principle
principle.description: Your health data remains yours. Lumida retrieves it only to display the features you request and does not build a permanent copy of your health measurements in its database.

data.title: Data we process
data.intro: Depending on how you use Lumida, the following categories may be processed:
data.account: Account data: first name, email address, profile image when supplied by Google, verification state, role and account dates.
data.authentication: Authentication and security data: password hash, provider account identifier and, where required, tokens used for social sign-in, session token, session expiry, IP address, user agent, verification records and rate-limit counters.
data.access: Beta-access administration data: the Google account email you submit, request language, request date and approval date.
data.preferences: Service preferences and administration data: language selected through the URL, appearance stored on the device, temperature unit, latest coarse activity date and any account restriction information.
data.connection: Google Health connection data: stable Google identifier, granted permissions, connection status and dates, and the encrypted refresh token needed to maintain the connection.
data.health: Health and fitness data requested on demand: activity and exercise, sleep, heart rate, oxygen saturation, recovery measurements, weight, nutrition, hydration and, when authorized, workout location routes.
data.communications: Product-feedback and communications data: feedback messages, account linkage, app language, time zone, normalized source page, viewport size, user agent and deployment version, plus email content and technical metadata when you contact Lumida or receive a transactional message.

purposes.title: Purposes and legal bases
purposes.service: Providing the account, authentication, preferences and requested service features: performance of the contract formed by these terms.
purposes.security: Protecting accounts, preventing abuse, administering beta access and maintaining the service: Lumida’s legitimate interests in security and reliable operation.
purposes.health: Retrieving and displaying Google Health data: your explicit consent under Articles 6(1)(a) and 9(2)(a) of the GDPR.
purposes.communication: Reviewing product feedback, responding to requests and sending account, security and access messages: performance of the service and Lumida’s legitimate interests in improving Lumida and answering users.
purposes.legal: Complying with legal obligations and establishing or defending legal claims: legal obligation or legitimate interest, as applicable.

consent.title: Consent for health data
consent.description: Connecting Google Health is optional. The connection flow explains that access is used to display your data in Lumida, then Google presents the requested read-only categories and asks you to approve them. Lumida does not use acceptance of the terms as consent for health-data processing.
consent.withdrawal: You may withdraw consent at any time by disconnecting Google Health in Lumida. Lumida then revokes the Google grant where possible and deletes the local connection record. Withdrawal does not affect processing lawfully carried out beforehand.

google.title: Google Health Limited Use
google.description: Lumida’s use of information received from the Google Health API adheres to the Google Health API Developer and User Data Policy, including its Limited Use requirements.
google.policyLink: Read the Google Health API Developer and User Data Policy

storage.title: How health data is handled
storage.health: Health measurements pass through Lumida’s server only for the time needed to answer your request. They are not written to Neon or persistent browser storage. The interface keeps responses temporarily in memory: data becomes stale after 15 minutes and an unused entry is removed after 30 minutes; the complete cache is cleared on sign-out.
storage.token: Google Health refresh tokens are encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM. Access tokens remain server-side and are kept only in short-lived process memory. OAuth tokens and health data are never exposed to browser storage.

providers.title: Recipients and service providers
providers.intro: Personal data is disclosed only as needed to operate Lumida, to the following categories of providers:
providers.neon: PostgreSQL account database ({location}). Health measurements are not stored there.
providers.google: social sign-in, OAuth authorization and the Google Health API, when chosen by the user.
providers.cloudflare: DNS protection and routing of messages sent to Lumida contact addresses.
providers.openStreetMap: map-tile delivery for a visible workout area; the complete route line is not uploaded to OpenStreetMap.

transfers.title: International transfers
transfers.description: The primary database region is Frankfurt and transactional email data is processed in Ireland. Some providers are established in the United States or may provide support from outside the European Economic Area. Where required, transfers rely on an adequacy mechanism such as the EU–US Data Privacy Framework, standard contractual clauses or another safeguard made available by the relevant provider.

retention.title: Retention periods
retention.account: Account data is kept while the account remains active, then deleted following a verified deletion request, except where retention is legally required.
retention.health: Health measurements are not retained in the database; temporary server and browser-memory handling is described above.
retention.connection: Google Health connection data is retained until you disconnect Google Health or the account is deleted.
retention.temporary: A Google Health OAuth transaction expires after 10 minutes, an email-verification link after one hour and a password-reset link after 15 minutes.
retention.communication: Account-linked product feedback is kept while useful for improving Lumida and is deleted with the account, unless retention is needed for a legal claim. Other correspondence is kept for the time needed to answer and manage follow-up.
retention.logs: Technical security and hosting logs are retained for limited periods according to provider settings and legitimate security needs. Provider backups may remain until their normal rotation completes.

cookies.title: Cookies and local storage
cookies.description: Lumida uses only storage that is necessary to provide the requested service or remember interface preferences:
cookies.oauth: short-lived security and language cookies during the Google Health OAuth flow;
cookies.preferences: a sidebar cookie and local device storage for the appearance preference.
cookies.noTracking: Lumida does not currently use advertising cookies, behavioural tracking or marketing analytics. These necessary mechanisms do not require an advertising-cookie banner.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.intro: Subject to the conditions of the GDPR, you may exercise the following rights:
rights.access: access and correct your personal data;
rights.delete: request erasure of your account data;
rights.restrict: object to or request restriction of certain processing;
rights.portability: receive data you provided in a portable format where applicable;
rights.withdraw: withdraw consent at any time, without affecting prior lawful processing.
rights.complaint: You may also lodge a complaint with the French data-protection authority, the

security.title: Security
security.description: Lumida applies measures designed to protect personal data, including server-side OAuth handling, encryption of Google Health refresh tokens, secure cookies, access controls, input validation and rate limiting. No online service can guarantee absolute security; users should also protect their credentials and devices.

minors.title: Adults only
minors.description: Lumida is reserved for people aged 18 or over and does not knowingly provide accounts to minors. If a minor’s data is identified, it may be deleted after appropriate verification.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.description: This policy may be updated when Lumida’s features, providers or legal obligations change. The effective date appears at the top of the page, and material changes will be communicated by an appropriate means.

contact.title: Privacy contact
contact.description: To exercise your rights or ask a privacy question, contact Lumida using the dedicated address below. Identity verification may be requested when reasonably necessary to protect the account.

PasswordChangedEmail.warning: If you did not make this change, request another password reset immediately and secure your email account.

GoogleHealthAccessEmail.preview: You can now connect Google Health to Lumida.
GoogleHealthAccessEmail.heading: Congratulations, your access has been approved
GoogleHealthAccessEmail.body: The Google Health or Fitbit account you submitted has been added to the authorized test users. You can now connect your account and access Lumida.
GoogleHealthAccessEmail.support: If you have trouble connecting, join us on Discord.

AdminOverviewPage.description: Account, feedback, and Google Health connection metrics.

googleHealthAccess.approvalSuccess: Google Health access approved and confirmation email sent.
googleHealthAccess.approvalError: Access could not be approved. Check the email service and try again.

SettingsPage.title: Settings
SettingsPage.description: Manage your account preferences and connected services.
SettingsPage.accountDescription: The account used to sign in to Lumida. It can be different from the connected Google Health account.
SettingsPage.preferencesDescription: Choose how Lumida appears and behaves for you.
SettingsPage.connectionsDescription: Manage the external services authorized to share data with Lumida.
SettingsPage.disconnectConfirmation: Revoking access disconnects Google Health and removes the connection from Lumida. Your health data will no longer be accessible in the app.
SettingsPage.notConnectedDescription: Google Health is not connected to Lumida.

HelpPage.title: Help & information
HelpPage.description: Learn how Lumida works and how your health data is handled.
HelpPage.aboutBody: Lumida requests your Google Health data on demand and presents it as simple summaries and trends. It is an information tool and does not provide medical diagnoses.
HelpPage.cacheNotice: Data is kept only in this session's in-memory cache.
HelpPage.storageNotice: Lumida does not write your health measurements to its database or to browser storage. Google Health data is requested on demand.
HelpPage.disconnectNotice: When you revoke Google Health access in Settings, Lumida deletes the local connection information and can no longer access your health data.
HelpPage.mapNotice: When a workout has a GPS route, its map stays in this browser session; OpenStreetMap only receives the tile requests needed to display the surrounding area.
HelpPage.changelogBody: See the latest improvements to Lumida, from health-data exploration to privacy and security.

developerMode.title: Added developer mode
developerMode.description: Raw health data can now be downloaded.

sleepSchedule.title: Sleep schedule chart
sleepSchedule.description: /sleep now shows a day-by-day chart of your sleep times over the selected period: bedtime and wake-up for each night, naps included, with the period averages.

vitalityDefault.title: Vitality is now the default theme
vitalityDefault.description: By default, Lumida now uses the Vitality palette in dark mode. The Catppuccin and Aurora palettes stay available anytime in the appearance settings.

sleepDataSources.title: Filter sleep by source (experimental)
sleepDataSources.description: When several sources feed your sleep data, /sleep can now filter by source and show only the ones you care about. Thanks to @GoombaAdventurer for the suggestion.

securityHardening.title: Security hardening
securityHardening.description: General security improvements across the app.

typographyIdentity.title: New typographic identity
typographyIdentity.description: Lumida adopts two new typefaces (Bricolage Grotesque for headings, Hanken Grotesk for text) for a bolder, more modern look, with a reworked hierarchy and more legible numbers across the dashboard.

catppuccinDefault.title: Catppuccin is now the default theme
catppuccinDefault.description: By default, Lumida now uses the Catppuccin palette in dark mode. The Aurora palette stays available anytime in the appearance settings.

italianLanguage.title: Added Italian
italianLanguage.description: Lumida is now available in Italian.

dashboardSleepStages.title: Added sleep stages to the dashboard
dashboardSleepStages.description: The dashboard now shows the sleep stages from the latest main sleep available in the selected period.

dashboardRecentActivity.title: Simplified Recent activity
dashboardRecentActivity.description: The card is now easier to read. Workout details remain available on the Activity page.

dashboardPeriodHighlight.title: New “Period highlight” card
dashboardPeriodHighlight.description: This card shows one key insight about your steps, sleep, or latest activity for the selected period.

navigationAndSleepLabels.title: Improved navigation and sleep charts
navigationAndSleepLabels.description: The sidebar has been reorganized, and several sleep chart labels have been clarified.

demonstrationMode.title: Added demonstration mode
demonstrationMode.description: Added an option to explore Lumida with a demonstration dataset.

mobileLayout.title: Improved mobile layout
mobileLayout.description: The dashboard now uses tighter spacing on mobile and shows the sync action as a compact icon there.

productFeedback.title: Added product feedback
productFeedback.description: Added a user feedback form accessible from the sidebar.

localTimeZone.title: Fixed local dates and times
localTimeZone.description: Dates and times now use the browser's local time zone, including daylight-saving changes. The issue occurred because production inherited the hosting server's UTC zone, while development inherited the developer machine's local zone. Thanks to @GoombaAdventurer for reporting this issue.

recoveryTrends.title: Added detailed recovery trends
recoveryTrends.description: A dedicated Recovery page now shows separate trends for resting heart rate, heart rate variability, breathing during sleep, and nighttime temperature. Thanks to @GoombaAdventurer for suggesting this improvement.

securityAndPerformance.title: Security and performance improvements
securityAndPerformance.description: Lumida now includes additional security improvements and performance optimizations for a more reliable and responsive experience.

recoverySignals.title: Added recovery signals
recoverySignals.description: The dashboard now brings together resting heart rate, heart rate variability, breathing during sleep, and nightly temperature when these measurements are available in Google Health.

temperatureUnitPreference.title: Added a temperature unit preference
temperatureUnitPreference.description: Settings now lets you display recovery temperatures in Celsius or Fahrenheit across your Lumida account.

workoutHeartRateZones.title: Added heart rate zones
workoutHeartRateZones.description: The workout detail page now shows a per-minute heart-rate graph, including for workouts recorded without a GPS route.

workoutDetails.title: Added exercise session details
workoutDetails.description: Each exercise session shown in Activity now links to a detail page, which presents the available measurements and displays the route on a map when a GPS track was recorded and Google Health permission is granted.

googleHealthCurrentPeriod.title: Fixed current-period synchronization
googleHealthCurrentPeriod.description: Google Health activity now synchronizes correctly at the start of a new local day, including just after midnight in time zones ahead of UTC.

googleHealthSecurity.title: Improved Google Health connection security
googleHealthSecurity.description: Google Health authorization is now bound to the Lumida session that initiated it, and each new connection creates a new credential version so previously cached access tokens cannot be reused.

appearance.title: Added appearance modes
appearance.description: Lumida now offers light, dark, and system appearance modes.

changelogPage.title: Added the What's new page
changelogPage.description: A What's new page now tracks new features, improvements, and fixes.

settings.title: Added account and connection settings
settings.description: A Settings page now lets you manage account information, the interface language, and the Google Health connection.

recentActivity.title: Added recent activities to the dashboard
recentActivity.description: The dashboard now shows recent Google Health workouts with duration, distance, calories, and other available session details.

onDemandHealth.title: On-demand health data
onDemandHealth.description: Health data is now requested from Google Health only when it is displayed; Lumida does not store health measurements in its database or in browser storage.

languages.title: Added English, French, and Spanish
languages.description: Lumida's interface is now available in English, French, and Spanish; dates and numbers are formatted according to the selected language.

GoogleHealth.title: Google Health
GoogleHealth.statusError: Unable to retrieve the connection status.
GoogleHealth.expiredDescription: Your Google Health connection has expired. Reconnect it to view your data.
GoogleHealth.notConnectedDescription: Connect your Google Health account to view your data in the app.

periodHighlight.peakDay: {date}, the most active day in the period.
periodHighlight.peakWeek: Week of {date}, the most active week in the period.
periodHighlight.notEnoughData: A comparison will appear when this period contains enough data.

RecoverySignalsCard.noData: No recovery signals for this period.
RecoverySignalsCard.noRestingHeartRate: No resting heart-rate data for this period.
RecoverySignalsCard.temperatureUnitHelp: You can change the temperature unit in Settings.

RecoveryPage.noHeartRateVariability: No heart-rate variability data for this period.
RecoveryPage.noRespiratoryRate: No sleep breathing data for this period.
RecoveryPage.noTemperature: No nighttime temperature data for this period.

ActivityPage.noSteps: No step data for this period.

ActivityPage.noWorkouts: No workouts recorded for this period. Your sport sessions will appear here.
ActivityPage.moreWorkouts: {count, plural, one {# earlier workout in this period is not listed} other {# earlier workouts in this period are not listed}}

WorkoutPage.title: Workout details
WorkoutPage.statusError: Unable to retrieve the Google Health connection status.
WorkoutPage.loadError: Unable to load this workout. It may no longer be available.
WorkoutPage.noMetrics: No detailed metrics are available for this workout.
WorkoutPage.routeDescription: Displays the GPS route recorded during this workout, when available.
WorkoutPage.routeMapLabel: Interactive map of the workout route
WorkoutPage.routeNotRecorded: No GPS route was recorded for this workout.
WorkoutPage.routeUnavailable: The GPS route is temporarily unavailable.
WorkoutPage.routePermissionRequired: This workout has a GPS route. Reconnect Google Health to authorize access to location data.
WorkoutPage.heartRateZoneNote: Zone thresholds are estimated from the recorded zone durations.
WorkoutPage.elevationDescription: Recorded elevation along the GPS timeline.
WorkoutPage.zonesDescription: Time recorded in each effort zone.
WorkoutPage.splitsDescription: Segments recorded by the device during the workout.
WorkoutPage.mobilityDescription: Advanced running metrics reported by the recording device.
WorkoutPage.eventsDescription: Starts, stops, pauses and resumes recorded by the device.

SleepPage.title: Sleep
SleepPage.noSessions: No sleep sessions for this period.
SleepPage.scheduleAverage: Average bedtime and wake-up over the period
SleepPage.noStages: No detailed stage timeline is available for this period.
SleepPage.napsSummary: {count, plural, one {# nap} other {# naps}} · {duration} on average
SleepPage.noNaps: No naps detected for this period.
SleepPage.allSourcesHidden: All sources are hidden. Enable at least one to see your sleep.

HeartPage.title: Health
HeartPage.periodAverage: {value} bpm on average over the period
HeartPage.noData: No heart rate data for this period.

WeightPage.title: Weight
WeightPage.periodAverage: {value} kg on average over the period
WeightPage.noData: No weight measurements for this period.
WeightPage.singleMeasurement: The chart appears once the period has at least two measurements.

NutritionPage.title: Nutrition
NutritionPage.scopeDescription: Reconnect Google Health to allow Lumida to read the nutrition and hydration data you log in Fitbit.
NutritionPage.macrosDescription: Estimated energy distribution over the selected period
NutritionPage.macroMethod: Estimated from logged amounts: 4 kcal/g for protein and carbohydrates, 9 kcal/g for fat.
NutritionPage.noMacros: No macronutrient data for this period.
NutritionPage.energyAverage: {value} kcal on average over {count, plural, one {# day with entries} other {# days with entries}}
NutritionPage.noEnergy: No energy intake data for this period.
NutritionPage.singleEnergy: The trend appears once the period has at least two entries.
NutritionPage.hydrationAverage: {value} L on average over {count, plural, one {# day with entries} other {# days with entries}}
NutritionPage.noHydration: No hydration data for this period.
